title: Continuity Requirement
description: Defines a rule for control-layer continuity: whether a control layer must be continuous, may be interrupted, must terminate, or must transition within a defined scope.

requirement_id.description: Unique identifier for this continuity requirement.

control_layer_id.description: Control layer this requirement governs. References shared/control_layers.json.

continuity_type.description: The continuity rule for this control layer within the defined scope.

scope.description: Where this requirement applies (e.g., 'all roof-to-wall transitions', 'entire building enclosure').

conditions.description: Conditions or qualifications for this requirement (e.g., climate zone restrictions, code references).

notes.description: Additional notes about this continuity requirement.
